# Load text
file_path = '/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text, len(text)

file_path = '/mnt/data/file-Q1pF6VE4FxPwpNzQKoiDNF-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
print(text)

text = text  # already loaded
# Define span texts
aya1 = "وَمَا كُنتُمْ تُخْفُونَ أَن يُبْدى لِلرَّسولِ مِنْ أَصَابَ بَعْضُكُمْ مِنْكُمْ أَوْ أَنتُمْ أَصَحُّ لَهُ بِهِ"
had1 = "لَمْ يَكُنْ لِعِيسَى عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"
had2 = "لَمْ يَكُنْ لِسيدنا مُحَمَدٍ عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"
aya2 = "وَمَا يَنْظُرُونَ إِلّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَزِحُونَ"
had3 = "لا عِلْمَ لِأَحَدٍ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"

# helper function to find all occurrences
def find_all(text, sub):
    starts = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        idx = text.find(sub, start)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        starts.append(idx)
        start = idx + 1
    return starts

# find occurrences
print("aya1 occurrences:", find_all(text, aya1))
print("had1 occurrences:", find_all(text, had1))
print("had2 occurrences:", find_all(text, had2))
print("aya2 occurrences:", find_all(text, aya2))
print("had3 occurrences:", find_all(text, had3))

spans = []
for name, starts, span_text in [("aya1", find_all(text, aya1), aya1),
                                ("had1", find_all(text, had1), had1),
                                ("had2", find_all(text, had2), had2),
                                ("aya2", find_all(text, aya2), aya2),
                                ("had3", find_all(text, had3), had3)]:
    for s in starts:
        e = s + len(span_text)
        assert text[s:e] == span_text, f"{name} text mismatch"
        spans.append((name, s, e))
spans
